candidates.why: A separate operating-level depreciation line exists, but it is not labelled as cost of goods sold / cost of sales / cost of revenues and therefore is not clearly attributable to the selected COGS bucket.
This appears to be a tiny balancing/component line tied to the broader depreciation summary, not a standalone COGS-specific D&A row.

variables.notes: Do not add any D&A row to COGS. The visible depreciation rows are separate operating lines but not specifically linked to COGS, so assigning them to the selected 'Cost of goods sold' row would be unsupported and risks misclassification.

candidates.why: This is a separate operating expense line at the same level as the selected SG&A-related rows ('Salary and personnel expenses' and 'Other operating expenses'). Those selected rows were explicitly chosen excluding depreciation, so this summary depreciation row should be added separately later. It also appears to be the summary total above more granular depreciation-related components, so it is preferred to avoid double counting.
This looks like a component/adjustment within the broader depreciation build-up, so it should not be selected when the summary 'Depreciation' row is available.

variables.notes: Select only the summary 'Depreciation' row for XSGA_DA. The lower rows appear to be components feeding that total (including lease right-of-use depreciation and small balancing/impairment items), so choosing the summary avoids double counting.
